title: Image optimization: Replace loadImage with ThumbnailCache + NSCache
description: Remove full-resolution loadImage(named:) from ThreadDetailView and replace all image loading with the downsampling ThumbnailCache. Swap ThumbnailCache backing store from plain dictionary to NSCache for automatic memory eviction. Refactor the edit flow to track existing photos by fileName instead of loading full UIImages.

title: Swap ThumbnailCache from Dict to NSCache
description: Replace the plain [String: UIImage] dictionary in ThumbnailCache actor with NSCache<NSString, UIImage>. NSCache auto-evicts under memory pressure, preventing unbounded growth. Set a reasonable countLimit (e.g. 100).

title: Refactor edit flow to track existing photos by fileName
description: Replace loadedImages-based edit flow with fileName tracking. Add existingPhotoFileNames: [String] state to ThreadDetailView. startEditing populates fileNames instead of loading full UIImages. updateEntry keeps existing fileNames and only saves genuinely new images. Eliminates the slow .pngData() equality comparison.

title: Update input bar to show existing photos via ThumbnailView
description: Update the input bar image preview section to render existingPhotoFileNames using ThumbnailView (downsampled) alongside newly picked UIImages. Remove loadImage(named:) function entirely from ThreadDetailView.
